title: avena nuda subsp. brevis
intro: Avena nuda subsp. brevis, also known as the wild oat grass, is a subspecies of oat grass that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Avena nuda subsp. brevis include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various health conditions.
